scope: Production email/password authentication and Google direct sign-in

automatedChecks.googleLoginAuditAndInviteClassification: PASS (first/repeat/invite events are atomic with challenge consumption; raw room and referral values are not logged)
automatedChecks.prismaGenerate: ENVIRONMENT_BLOCKED: Windows EPERM on an already loaded query_engine-windows.dll.node; the existing generated client completed API build and tests

checks: auth surface and Google CSP/COOP headers
public Google runtime configuration without private credentials
nonce-bound Google challenge without recorded challenge values
missing-account password-reset non-enumeration without using a real mailbox

manualAcceptanceStillRequired: Confirm the latest reset email arrived and matches the official template
Open the latest reset link, set a private password, prove the old password fails and the new password logs in, then prove the same reset link cannot be replayed
Complete a production Google login after the CSP deployment, refresh and reopen the site, then log out
Complete first and repeat login with a second real Google test account
Complete Google login from a real room invitation and prove room/ref/channel return context is preserved
secretHandling: No password, cookie, access token, Google credential, challenge nonce, email action token, API key, or full Google subject is stored in this artifact.
